title: Codex Loop Dispatch Payload v2
description: Strict client_payload schema for repository_dispatch event_type codex-loop.

schema_version.description: Payload schema version. Must be 2 for explicit state-pointer dispatches.

pr_number.description: Pull request number in the receiving repository.

head_sha.description: Expected pull request head SHA checked by stale-head guards.

iteration.description: Zero-based loop iteration. Continuation is allowed only while iteration is less than max_iterations.

correlation_id.description: Stable loop chain id used by summaries, concurrency, and artifact naming.

requested_by.description: GitHub login or app slug that requested this loop step.

state_run_id.description: GitHub Actions run id that produced the state artifact for this step.

state_artifact_name.description: Exact artifact name containing the state bundle for this step.

max_iterations.description: Maximum loop iterations. A run where iteration is greater than or equal to this value must not redispatch.

dry_run.description: When true, prevents live write/finalize behavior.
